featureName: BUG-020-010: QF-decisions callback keystore reads directly from os.Getenv, bypassing the Config SST single-ingestion-point

executionHistory.summary: Code-review finding SEC-2 (P2 SST/security) filed by user. internal/connector/qfdecisions/callback_keystore.go L137 reads QF_DECISIONS_CALLBACK_SIGNING_KEYS_JSON via os.Getenv directly — the only connector bypassing the Config SST single-ingestion-point pattern. Created 8-artifact bug folder mirroring BUG-020-009's recipe.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand discovery and documentation phases because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.discovery / bubbles.documentation specialist dispatch; bubbles.bug already covered these phases at packet creation time and the parent-expand entry records that provenance explicitly per Gate G022
executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded provenance entry for discovery + documentation phases.

TDD code change. Naming decision finalized in report.md BEFORE any code edits (Config field QFDecisionsCallbackSigningKeysJSON; env var QF_DECISIONS_CALLBACK_SIGNING_KEYS_JSON REUSED; PERMISSIVE policy; no LoadCallbackKeystoreFromConfig wrapper — callers consume LoadCallbackKeystoreFromJSON(jsonStr) directly via SourceConfig plumb). RED captured: BUG020010 tests fail to BUILD against unmigrated tree (cfg.QFDecisionsCallbackSigningKeysJSON undefined; parsed.CallbackSigningKeysJSON undefined) — strongest possible RED. Implementation: new Config field + Load population + PERMISSIVE Validate block; QFConfig.CallbackSigningKeysJSON + parseConfig extraction from SourceConfig; Connect() consumes parsed.CallbackSigningKeysJSON via LoadCallbackKeystoreFromJSON; LoadCallbackKeystoreFromEnv() deleted; "os" import removed; CallbackSigningKeysEnvVar const kept as doc reference; cmd/core/connectors.go plumbs JSON into qfCfg.SourceConfig; scripts/commands/config.sh emits new env var (precedent: BUG-020-009). GREEN: 7 BUG020010 tests PASS (3 in internal/config + 3 + 1 migrated rename in internal/connector/qfdecisions); race-detector targeted run clean; ./smackerel.sh test unit PASS for every touched package (internal/config 22.979s; internal/connector/qfdecisions 0.691s; cmd/core 0.522s). Single unrelated FAIL in internal/connector/keep is pre-existing spec 059 in-progress work (git status confirms zero changes to internal/connector/keep/ under this bug-fix's diff). go vet -tags=integration + go vet -tags=e2e both clean. Helper-eradication grep exits 1; permanent structural guard test enforces. Change boundary primary: config/smackerel.yaml (already had key from spec 041), internal/config/config.go, internal/connector/qfdecisions/* (callback_keystore.go + connector.go + tests). Necessary plumbing deviations (audit-listed in report.md "Boundary Deviations from Plan"): cmd/core/connectors.go (single production wiring caller; Connect() interface signature is fixed), scripts/commands/config.sh (SST env emission), tests/e2e/qf_callback_signing_test.go (2 sites — migrated to SourceConfig to mirror production wiring).

The Config field + Load + Validate triplet mirrors the surrounding QFDecisions* fields (precedent: BUG-020-008/009). executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand security phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.security dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence
executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded security pass: A05 Security Misconfiguration STRENGTHENED. The callback HMAC bridge signing keystore now routes through the same SST single-ingestion-point as every other QF-decisions secret, eliminating the lone production env-read bypass. A malformed env var is surfaced at boot (Validate()) instead of at first connector start. No new attack surface. The keystore JSON is not logged; Validate() error message names only the env-var key and the underlying JSON parse error (no secret material disclosure).

certification.auditNote: Real code change (NOT artifact-only). RED captured as build-failure errors (strongest possible RED — BUG020010 tests reference cfg.QFDecisionsCallbackSigningKeysJSON + parsed.CallbackSigningKeysJSON struct fields that only exist post-migration). GREEN confirmed: 7 BUG020010 test functions PASS post-fix; race-detector clean for both packages; ./smackerel.sh test unit PASS for every touched package; go vet -tags=integration + go vet -tags=e2e both clean. os.Getenv literal eradicated from callback_keystore.go (grep exit=1; permanent structural guard test enforces; "os" import also removed). PERMISSIVE validation policy adopted (matches today's deployment shape). Change boundary primary: internal/config/config.go + internal/connector/qfdecisions/callback_keystore.go + internal/connector/qfdecisions/connector.go + internal/connector/qfdecisions/callback_keystore_test.go + tests/integration/qf_callback_signing_test.go + tests/integration/qf_watch_proposal_test.go + NEW internal/config/bug020010_qf_signing_keys_test.go + NEW internal/connector/qfdecisions/bug020010_config_ingestion_test.go + bug folder. SHIP_IT.
